name: Community Bank Of Elmhurst
description_short: Community Bank of Elmhurst is an Illinois-based community bank offering personal and business banking services with a focus on personalized customer service and community reinvestment.
description_long:
Community Bank of Elmhurst is a community-focused financial institution operating in Illinois, emphasizing personalized banking relationships and local community engagement. The bank explicitly states its mission as putting "the people back into banking" and prioritizing customers and community first in all operations. This positioning reflects a traditional community bank model that differentiates itself from larger national institutions through localized decision-making and relationship-based service delivery.

The bank offers both personal and business banking services, including checking and savings accounts, debit cards, current interest rate products, and telephone banking services. They provide standard banking conveniences such as multiple locations, online banking capabilities, and mobile banking options. The bank also participates in Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) evaluations by the Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation, demonstrating commitment to serving low-to-moderate income households and community financial service needs.

Community Bank of Elmhurst distinguishes itself through its explicit community banking philosophy and local market focus. The bank maintains physical branch locations in the Elmhurst area, provides direct phone support for customer inquiries, and publishes a company blog for community engagement. Their emphasis on transparency regarding Community Reinvestment Act performance and openness to public input about community service distinguishes them from institutions focused purely on profit maximization.

The bank's online banking infrastructure appears to have technical limitations, as the enrollment application at the secondary URL returns error messages indicating service unavailability. Website security warnings about email communication and third-party link disclosures are standard industry practice. Overall, Community Bank of Elmhurst functions as a traditional retail and business bank for the Illinois market, best suited for customers seeking local banking relationships and community-focused financial services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Lost and stolen debit card replacement
Wire transfer and money movement services
pros: Community-focused mission explicitly prioritizing local customers and community reinvestment over profit maximization
Multiple physical branch locations in Elmhurst area for in-person banking services
Both personal and business banking services available through single institution
Telephone banking support available (877-929-1500) for account management convenience
Transparent Community Reinvestment Act performance evaluation published and available to public
Debit card services with dedicated lost/stolen card support line (1-800-236-2442)
Published current interest rates available by phone (630-782-1234) for rate transparency
cons: Online banking enrollment application appears non-functional with persistent technical errors
Limited information on website about specific account types, fee structures, or product offerings
Website contains generic privacy and security disclaimers without specific detail about data protection practices
No transparent information available about FDIC insurance coverage or account protections
Mobile banking platform details not described on main website
best_for: Elmhurst, Illinois residents seeking local banking with community relationship focus
Small business owners preferring local bank decision-making over corporate policies
Customers who value in-person branch banking and personalized service relationships
diagnosis: Community Bank of Elmhurst is best for Illinois residents and local business owners seeking a traditional community bank with personalized service and local decision-making. The primary caveat is that their online banking infrastructure appears to have technical issues, and the website provides limited specific information about product offerings, fee schedules, and competitive rates, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed service information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
